Title: Data & Analytics Engineer
Description:
To support the growth of our client base and the evolution of our data platform, we are looking for a Data & Analytics Engineer with 2–4 years of experience who can become a key reference point for data analysis and contribute to the development of our data infrastructure.

The role will work closely with the Tech, Product, and Business teams and will be responsible for:


Verifying, certifying, and continuously monitoring the quality and reliability of data collected by our proprietary systems
Extracting, transforming, and validating data from relational databases (MS SQL, Postgres) and non-relational databases (Cassandra)
Supporting the design and maintenance of data pipelines (ETL/ELT) using Python and Databricks
Performing exploratory analysis on complex datasets (mobility, flows, spatio-temporal data)
Identifying patterns, anomalies, missing data, and relevant trends
Producing structured reports (mobility reports, custom client analyses, internal analyses)
Extracting high-value insights from collected data
Preparing and presenting analyses and results to clients, with strong storytelling skills and the ability to translate data into actionable recommendations



The goal is to evolve the role toward increasing autonomy in managing the full data lifecycle: collection, validation, modeling, analysis, and reporting.

MUST HAVE


Strong knowledge of key languages and frameworks for data analysis / data engineering (Python, Pandas, etc.)
Familiarity with object-oriented programming
Strong knowledge of SQL-based relational databases
Ability to write complex queries and work with structured datasets
Good command of English (written and spoken)



NICE TO HAVE


2–4 years of experience in data analytics and/or data engineering
Experience designing or maintaining data pipelines (ETL/ELT)
Knowledge of data visualization tools (Plotly, Seaborn)
Experience with highly spatio-temporal datasets (time series, geolocated data, mobility data)
Experience with non-relational databases (e.g., Cassandra)
Familiarity with cloud environments



What We Offer


Technical and professional growth opportunities in an innovative, high-tech environment
The opportunity to take on increasing responsibility in strategic projects
A dynamic, interdisciplinary, and results-driven workplace
Location: Milan (MM Precotto) / hybrid work model (work from home available)



Resumes must include written authorization for the processing of personal data in accordance with GDPR (EU Regulation 2016/679).

Blimp is an equal opportunity employer: this job posting is open to all genders in accordance with Italian Legislative Decree no. 198/2006.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
In Boolean supportiamo le migliori realtà aziendali nella ricerca dei loro talenti. Oggi siamo alla ricerca di un Data Analyst (Hybrid Data Analyst / Scientist) per un’importante e solida realtà aziendale in forte espansione, caratterizzata da una cultura fortemente orientata ai dati e all'innovazione.




Informazioni sul ruolo: La risorsa, lavorerà in un contesto in cui l'IT è integrato nell'area Finance, collaborando a stretto contatto con il BI & AI Lead aziendale.




Responsabilità:

"Sporcarsi le mani" nell'operatività quotidiana e sull'architettura dati per mappare, estrarre e centralizzare il patrimonio informativo aziendale derivante dai sistemi core lavorando sulla nuova infrastruttura target (Microsoft Fabric).
Sviluppare modelli statistici e di Machine Learning di base in Python per implementare analisi predittive ad oggi assenti.
Tradurre l'enorme mole di dati transazionali e relazionali in input concreti, chiari e perfettamente azionabili.
Supportare ed evolvere i modelli di Business Intelligence all'interno dell'ambiente Power BI di team.




Requisiti:

Ottima conoscenza tecnica hands-on di SQL (estrazione avanzata, gestione DB e tabelle complesse) e Python(scrittura codice per modelli statistici).
Capacità di muoversi autonomamente all'interno di modelli Power BI.
Solide basi metodologiche di statistica, analisi predittiva e interpretazione dei dati di vendita.
Capacità di muoversi nel progetto con una guida strategica ma totale indipendenza nella messa a terra (execution). Aver partecipato a progetti legati al mondo CRM o della Sales Analysis costituirà un forte plus.
Rappresenta un plus il potenziale di apprendimento rapido supportato da solide basi di Data Engineering/Cloud.




Cosa si offre:

RAL competitiva compresa nel range € 45.000 - € 50.000

Title: Data Analytics Specialist
Description:
Job description:

We are looking for a motivated Data Analytics Specialist to join our ICT Team and contribute to our Artificial Intelligence initiatives.
If you're eager to learn, passionate about data and technology, and excited to work in a multicultural and dynamic environment, this could be the perfect opportunity for you.
Key Responsibilities
* Collaborate with business and technology leaders to define the AI strategy for data analytics, focusing on decision support and predictive capabilities

* Evaluate and contribute to the selection and implementation of the AI-powered analytics platform, ensuring alignment with Tenova's strategic goals

* Explore and prototype AI/ML models to extract insights from structured and unstructured data, supporting strategic planning and operational excellence

* Support the transition from legacy systems (e.g., SAP BW) by ensuring continuity of data access and quality, while driving innovation through new platforms

* Design and deliver interactive dashboards and visualizations (Power BI or similar) to communicate insights effectively to stakeholders

* Ensure data governance, security, and compliance across all analytics and AI initiatives

What we ask for
* Solid experience with SAP Business Warehouse (data modeling, ETL, reporting)

* Strong understanding of data analytics architectures, with interest or experience in AI/ML applications

* Familiarity with Power BI or other BI tools is a plus

* Strategic mindset with the ability to translate business needs into data-driven solutions

* Excellent communication and stakeholder engagement skills

* Fluent in English

What we offer
* The opportunity to work on innovative AI-driven projects with real business impact
* A dynamic and international environment where ideas are valued

* Continuous learning (training, exposure to new technologies, cross-team collaboration)
* The applicable collective labor agreement is CCNL per Industria Metalmeccanica Privata e della Installazione di Impianti
* Hybrid working model (6-8 days)
* 14th-month salary
* Performance bonus linked to business results
* Performance Management: continuous development process with multi-source feedback and defined development actions
* Annual welfare benefits worth €250
* Savings & leisure: access to discounts on transport, sports, travel, and cultural activities
* Supplementary healthcare coverage
* Well-being initiatives


For the position, the starting gross annual salary will be from € 40.000, with the final offer determined based on the candidate's seniority, experience, and skills, as well as the outcome of the selection process.

Workplace: Castellanza (VA)

Title: Data Engineer
Description:
CHI SIAMO

AGAP2 è un gruppo europeo di consulenza ingegneristica operativa facente parte del Gruppo MoOngy.

Presente in 14 paesi europei con oltre 9.000 dipendenti, abbiamo aperto circa sette anni fa la nostra prima sede italiana a Milano. Grazie alla continua crescita del gruppo, siamo costantemente alla ricerca di professionisti che condividano i nostri valori: AMBIZIONE, SORRISO, DINAMISMO, VOGLIA DI METTERSI IN GIOCO, all’interno di una realtà in continua evoluzione dove le relazioni umane sono sempre al primo posto.




Ruolo

Siamo alla ricerca di un Energy Data Engineer da inserire all'interno di progetti innovativi in ambito Energy & Sustainability.

La risorsa contribuirà allo sviluppo di soluzioni digitali avanzate per il monitoraggio, l'analisi e l'ottimizzazione delle performance energetiche di edifici e impianti complessi, collaborando con team multidisciplinari composti da Energy Engineer, Data Scientist e specialisti HVAC.

L'attività si svolgerà in modalità ibrida presso la sede del cliente a Seriate (BG).




Cosa farai:

Analizzare dati energetici e HVAC per individuare opportunità di efficientamento e ottimizzazione.
Sviluppare modelli digitali (Digital Twin) e algoritmi predittivi per il monitoraggio delle performance energetiche.
Realizzare dashboard e strumenti di reportistica avanzata a supporto delle decisioni operative.
Collaborare con team multidisciplinari per sviluppare soluzioni innovative in ambito Energy & Sustainability.




Cosa richiediamo:

Laurea in Ingegneria Energetica, Informatica, Fisica o discipline affini.
Esperienza di almeno 2-3 anni in ambito Energy Data Analytics.
Buona conoscenza di sistemi HVAC e impianti energetici.
Ottima conoscenza di Python e dei principali strumenti di analisi dati.
Esperienza con Power BI, Tableau o strumenti equivalenti.
Attitudine al problem solving e forte orientamento all'analisi dei dati.




Cosa offriamo?

Contratto a tempo indeterminato e/o collaborazione in Partita IVA;
Retribuzione commisurata all’esperienza e alle competenze maturate;
Percorsi di formazione tecnica e manageriale;
Follow-up costanti con il team HR e con il proprio Business Manager;
Piano di crescita professionale strutturato;
Inserimento in un ambiente dinamico, internazionale e in continua crescita.




La retribuzione per questo ruolo è compresa tra 40.000 € e 50.000 €.

La posizione è inquadrata nell’ambito del CCNL Commercio e Terziario applicato dalla nostra società.

Il posizionamento all’interno del range sarà definito in base alle competenze tecniche, all’esperienza specifica nel ruolo e agli esiti del processo di selezione, secondo criteri oggettivi e neutri.

In presenza di profili con caratteristiche eccezionali rispetto al range indicato, potrà essere valutata una revisione previa approvazione interna.




The world needs you!

AGAP2 è un equal opportunities employer: crediamo che tutte le forme di diversità siano fonte di arricchimento reciproco. Ci impegniamo a garantire un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, nel quale ogni singola risorsa possa apportare un valore unico alla nostra realtà.

Accogliamo candidature senza distinzione di età, genere, nazionalità, disabilità, orientamento sessuale, religione o stato civile.

Prestiamo inoltre particolare attenzione alle candidature appartenenti alle categorie protette ai sensi degli articoli 1 e 18 della Legge 68/99.

Title: Data Analyst (Rif. 2026-181)
Description:
aizoOn, società di tecnologia e consulenza, indipendente, operante a livello globale, ricerca un / a Data Analyst.







Sarà coinvolto/a nell'ambito di progetti per un importante cliente in ambito Finance, occupandosi delle seguenti attività:




Collaborare ai progetti data-driven, supportando l’intero ciclo di vita delle soluzioni: dalla raccolta dei requisiti business all’analisi tecnico-funzionale, fino alla progettazione, allo sviluppo e alla messa in produzione
Redigere la documentazione tecnica e funzionale, garantendo una mappatura chiara e completa delle informazioni presenti nel Data Warehouse
Raccogliere le esigenze di business e delle varie funzioni interne al fine di sviluppare soluzioni adeguate nel rispetto delle best practices
Gestire le attività di esercizio e manutenzione applicativa della piattaforma, garantendone il corretto utilizzo, favorendo l’automazione e il miglioramento continuo dei processi IT




PROFILO




Laurea in discipline tecnico-scientifiche (Informatica, Ingegneria, Matematica, Fisica, Statistica o affini)
Almeno 3 anni di esperienza nel ruolo




COMPETENZE TECNICHE




Esperienza nell’analisi dei dati su database relazionali, con particolare attenzione alle tecnologie Oracle, e conoscenza dei principali oggetti database (tabelle, viste, indici, partizioni, procedure, sinonimi)
Ottima padronanza del linguaggio SQL
Competenze nella modellazione dei dati a livello concettuale, logico e fisico
Conoscenza dei principali temi di data governance (data quality, data lineage, data dictionary, business glossary, ecc.)
Costituisce un plus la familiarità con Oracle Data Integrator e con strumenti di Business Intelligence come Power BI.







SEDE DI LAVORO




Milano

E' richiesta la presenza 3 giorni a settimana presso sede cliente.







INFORMAZIONI CONTRATTUALI




Stiamo aggiornando i nostri annunci ai sensi del Dlgs del 7 maggio 2026, n.ro 96. Le ulteriori informazioni di dettaglio possono essere richieste/saranno fornite direttamente in sede di colloquio.




Il ruolo, la seniority, le credenziali educative, le qualifiche, le certificazioni e le competenze professionali compongono gli elementi di valutazione per determinare il quadro retributivo.




La retribuzione variabile e i benefits sono in funzione del ruolo e della responsabilità.




CCNL Terziario

Level 2-1

Salary Band € 35.000 – 40.000

Variable Pay Band € 1.000-3000

Welfare Band € 1.000

Meal Vouchers € 8




In aizoOn non tolleriamo comportamenti discriminatori e ci impegniamo a rispettare e valorizzare l'unicità di ciascuna persona.




EQUAL OPPORTUNITY




The job search refers to candidates of both genders

Title: Data Analyst Specialist
Description:
Chi siamo

In Mavriq, parte di Moltiply Group, aiutiamo le persone a fare la scelta giusta - che si tratti di un mutuo, un’assicurazione, una fornitura di energia o un piano telefonico. I nostri brand, tra cui MutuiOnline.it, Segugio.it, SOStariffe.it, Trovaprezzi.it, Switcho, e realtà internazionali come LeLynx.fr, Rastreator.com, Pricewise.nl e Verivox.de, offrono chiarezza in mercati spesso complessi e poco trasparenti. Crediamo nel potere dei dati, nella trasparenza e nell’innovazione - perché cambiare le regole, quando non funzionano al meglio, è nel nostro DNA.




Posizione

Stiamo cercando un/una Data Analyst Specialist che si unisca al nostro team per garantire l’integrità, l’affidabilità e la coerenza dei dati all’interno dei nostri sistemi. La figura avrà un ruolo chiave nel monitoraggio continuo dei rilasci, nella verifica della qualità dei dati e nell'identificazione tempestiva di anomalie o scostamenti rispetto agli standard attesi.

L’obiettivo principale è assicurare che i dati rimangano accurati, completi e allineati ai requisiti di business, supportando i team tecnici e operativi nelle attività di controllo e miglioramento continuo.




Cosa offriamo

Crediamo che la crescita nasca dall’incontro tra curiosità e autonomia. Offriamo un ambiente ibrido e flessibile, formazione continua e spazio per sperimentare, imparare e migliorare. Lavorerai in un team con cui condividerai successi, affronterai sfide e raggiungerai risultati. A completare il quadro, un pacchetto di benefit solido: assicurazione sanitaria (CCNL Commercio), buoni pasto, welfare, e accesso a piattaforme di e-learning.




Dove lavorerai

La nostra sede è in Via Desenzano 2, Milano (MM1 Gambara). Lavoriamo in modalità ibrida: almeno due giorni a settimana in ufficio e fino a tre in smart working. I momenti in presenza sono fondamentali per confrontarci, scambiare idee e alimentare la cultura di squadra che ci distingue.




Cosa Farai

Monitorare regolarmente i rilasci applicativi e valutare l’impatto sui dati.
Eseguire controlli di qualità dei dati (Data Quality Check) su base periodica e on-demand.
Identificare anomalie, inconsistenze e deviazioni rispetto ai benchmark attesi.
Collaborare con i team di sviluppo, prodotto e business per risolvere eventuali problemi legati ai dati.
Creare e mantenere report, dashboard e metriche di monitoraggio della data quality.
Documentare processi, controlli e risultati delle analisi.
Contribuire alla definizione e implementazione di regole di Data Quality e flussi di monitoraggio automatizzato.
Proporre soluzioni e miglioramenti ai processi di gestione del dato.




Requisiti

Ottima conoscenza di SQL e capacità di interrogare database complessi.
Buona conoscenza di strumenti di data visualization (es. Power BI, Tableau).
Esperienza con Excel e strumenti di analisi.
Familiarità con processi di ETL, data pipeline e concetti di data governance.
Conoscenza dei principali indicatori di Data Quality (accuratezza, completezza, coerenza, tempestività, unicità).
Laurea in discipline STEM (Informatica, Statistica, Matematica, Ingegneria o affini).
1–3 anni di esperienza in ruoli simili (Data Analyst, Data Quality Specialist, Business Analyst).
Conoscenza del ciclo di vita del software e gestione dei rilasci (nice to have).




Altre informazioni

In Mavriq non diamo nulla per scontato: pensiamo, testiamo, impariamo.

Ogni giorno è un giorno uno, e ogni sfida è un’occasione per migliorare.

Se ti rivedi in questo approccio, non vediamo l’ora di conoscerti.




(La ricerca è rivolta a candidati di entrambi i sessi, ai sensi delle Leggi n. 903/77 e n. 125/91.)

HTML:
Chi siamo

In Mavriq, parte di Moltiply Group, aiutiamo le persone a fare la scelta giusta - che si tratti di un mutuo, un’assicurazione, una fornitura di energia o un piano telefonico. I nostri brand, tra cui MutuiOnline.it, Segugio.it, SOStariffe.it, Trovaprezzi.it, Switcho, e realtà internazionali come LeLynx.fr, Rastreator.com, Pricewise.nl e Verivox.de, offrono chiarezza in mercati spesso complessi e poco trasparenti. Crediamo nel potere dei dati, nella trasparenza e nell’innovazione - perché cambiare le regole, quando non funzionano al meglio, è nel nostro DNA.


Posizione

Stiamo cercando un/una Data Analyst Specialist che si unisca al nostro team per garantire l’integrità, l’affidabilità e la coerenza dei dati all’interno dei nostri sistemi. La figura avrà un ruolo chiave nel monitoraggio continuo dei rilasci, nella verifica della qualità dei dati e nell'identificazione tempestiva di anomalie o scostamenti rispetto agli standard attesi.

L’obiettivo principale è assicurare che i dati rimangano accurati, completi e allineati ai requisiti di business, supportando i team tecnici e operativi nelle attività di controllo e miglioramento continuo.


Cosa offriamo

Crediamo che la crescita nasca dall’incontro tra curiosità e autonomia. Offriamo un ambiente ibrido e flessibile, formazione continua e spazio per sperimentare, imparare e migliorare. Lavorerai in un team con cui condividerai successi, affronterai sfide e raggiungerai risultati. A completare il quadro, un pacchetto di benefit solido: assicurazione sanitaria (CCNL Commercio), buoni pasto, welfare, e accesso a piattaforme di e-learning.


Dove lavorerai

La nostra sede è in Via Desenzano 2, Milano (MM1 Gambara). Lavoriamo in modalità ibrida: almeno due giorni a settimana in ufficio e fino a tre in smart working. I momenti in presenza sono fondamentali per confrontarci, scambiare idee e alimentare la cultura di squadra che ci distingue.


Cosa Farai

  • Monitorare regolarmente i rilasci applicativi e valutare l’impatto sui dati.
  • Eseguire controlli di qualità dei dati (Data Quality Check) su base periodica e on-demand.
  • Identificare anomalie, inconsistenze e deviazioni rispetto ai benchmark attesi.
  • Collaborare con i team di sviluppo, prodotto e business per risolvere eventuali problemi legati ai dati.
  • Creare e mantenere report, dashboard e metriche di monitoraggio della data quality.
  • Documentare processi, controlli e risultati delle analisi.
  • Contribuire alla definizione e implementazione di regole di Data Quality e flussi di monitoraggio automatizzato.
  • Proporre soluzioni e miglioramenti ai processi di gestione del dato.


Requisiti

  • Ottima conoscenza di SQL e capacità di interrogare database complessi.
  • Buona conoscenza di strumenti di data visualization (es. Power BI, Tableau).
  • Esperienza con Excel e strumenti di analisi.
  • Familiarità con processi di ETL, data pipeline e concetti di data governance.
  • Conoscenza dei principali indicatori di Data Quality (accuratezza, completezza, coerenza, tempestività, unicità).
  • Laurea in discipline STEM (Informatica, Statistica, Matematica, Ingegneria o affini).
  • 1–3 anni di esperienza in ruoli simili (Data Analyst, Data Quality Specialist, Business Analyst).
  • Conoscenza del ciclo di vita del software e gestione dei rilasci (nice to have).


Altre informazioni

In Mavriq non diamo nulla per scontato: pensiamo, testiamo, impariamo.

Ogni giorno è un giorno uno, e ogni sfida è un’occasione per migliorare.

Se ti rivedi in questo approccio, non vediamo l’ora di conoscerti.


(La ricerca è rivolta a candidati di entrambi i sessi, ai sensi delle Leggi n. 903/77 e n. 125/91.)

Title: Data Analyst
HTML:
Chi siamo

La missione di Massima Energia è rendere semplice ciò che è complesso. Non stiamo solo costruendo un'azienda: stiamo riprogettando il modello di servizio. Siamo la prima piattaforma AI in Italia focalizzata sul cliente, nata per reinventare il modo in cui le persone accedono ai servizi. Energia, mobile, internet e soluzioni a valore aggiunto convergono in un unico ecosistema intelligente, progettato intorno alle persone e non ai processi.


La centralità del cliente guida ogni nostra azione. Il risultato è un’esperienza che unisce praticità, efficienza e trasparenza: un impegno che i nostri clienti riconoscono quotidianamente, con un punteggio di 4.6 su 5 su Trustpilot. L'innovazione è il nostro motore: crediamo in una tecnologia capace di fare davvero la differenza. Con MaxTech, il nostro hub tecnologico guidato dall'AI, stiamo definendo i nuovi standard del futuro: un ecosistema dove l'intelligenza è al servizio delle persone, i servizi anticipano i bisogni e l’esperienza cliente è in costante evoluzione.


Se vuoi generare un valore concreto, vivi le sfide come un'opportunità e desideri essere protagonista del cambiamento, ti stiamo aspettando. Unisciti alla rivoluzione. Questo è un posto per chi ha il coraggio di innovare.


Descrizione del lavoro

Stiamo cercando una persona appassionata di digitale e progetti innovativi, da inserire nel nostro team come Data Analyst. La persona ideale, prima ancora delle competenze specifiche, possiede una spiccata attitudine imprenditoriale, è proattiva e motivata ad approfondire e sviluppare i progetti, con grande attenzione alla concretezza e alla collaborazione e un’ossessione per la comprensione dettagliata sia del dato che del business.


Il team di cui farai parte lavora su progetti innovativi che combinano l'analisi dei dati e l'intelligenza artificiale, creando soluzioni all'avanguardia per ottimizzare e trasformare i processi aziendali. Se sei appassionato di tecnologie emergenti e desideri contribuire a progetti che fanno la differenza, questa è l'opportunità che fa per te!


Attività

  • Sviluppare dashboard interattive e report dinamici tramite Power BI, assicurando accuratezza e certezza del dato, chiarezza e fruibilità delle informazioni; ottimizzare e migliorare quelle già esistenti e la loro architettura;
  • Collaborare con i diversi team aziendali (es. Marketing, Sales, Operations) per comprendere le loro esigenze e fornire soluzioni data driven;
  • Garantire qualità e affidabilità dei dati attraverso estrazioni, trasformazioni ed elaborazioni su database utilizzando SQL;
  • Effettuare analisi approfondite sui dati aziendali per identificare trend, anomalie e opportunità di miglioramento;
  • Creare e aggiornare report periodici, garantendo insight chiari e utili a supportare le decisioni aziendali;
  • Utilizzare Excel in modo avanzato per analisi, manipolazione e visualizzazione dei dati;
  • Gestire la complessità del dato e per estrarre informazioni che richiedono interrogazioni complesse, identificando gli strumenti più adeguati per raggiungere l’obiettivo;
  • Supportare progetti legati all’intelligenza artificiale, con forte focus su analisi e interpretazione dei dati in relazione alle logiche di business e finalizzate all’ottimizzazione di strumenti esistenti e alla creazione di nuovi;
  • Sviluppare algoritmi (utilizzando e.g. python o altri linguaggi e/o strumenti) per l’ottimizzazione di processi aziendali.


Requisiti base

  • Esperienza di 2–4 anni in ruoli di Data Analyst o simili;
  • Ottima conoscenza di Power BI per la creazione di dashboard e report avanzati;
  • Esperienza nell’utilizzo di MySQL e scrittura di query SQL;
  • Buona conoscenza di Python per analisi dati, automazione e manipolazione;
  • Padronanza avanzata di Excel;
  • Forte orientamento al dato e attenzione estrema alla qualità, precisione e coerenza delle informazioni;
  • Mentalità analitica, approccio strutturato e capacità di problem solving;
  • Attitudine proattiva, spirito collaborativo e orientamento ai risultati;
  • Curiosità e orientamento alla comprensione del dettaglio: porsi molte domande e non essere soddisfatti finché non si è compreso anche l’ultimo aspetto.


Mindset

  • Avere spirito imprenditoriale, propositivo ed innovativo;
  • Portare a compimento i progetti prima del tempo previsto;
  • Più veloce è, più semplice è, meglio è;
  • Non concentrarsi sui problemi, ma sulle soluzioni;
  • Andare oltre le mansioni assegnate pur mostrandosi curiosi verso nuove attività;
  • Imparare velocemente;
  • Essere rigorosi ed equi con colleghi, partner e clienti.


Cosa offriamo

  • Ambiente inclusivo e dinamico: Lavorerai in un contesto in costante evoluzione, orientato alla crescita e alla collaborazione reciproca;
  • Percorsi di crescita e mentoring: Opportunità di avanzamento professionale e specializzazione in tecnologie avanzate. Potrai anche accedere a programmi di mentoring per sviluppare le tue competenze;
  • Collaborazione interfunzionale: Avrai l’opportunità di lavorare con diverse funzioni aziendali, acquisendo una visione completa del business;
  • Progetti innovativi e sfidanti: Contribuirai a progetti strategici che favoriscono lo sviluppo di nuove soluzioni e il miglioramento dei processi aziendali attraverso i dati;
  • Flessibilità: Lavoro in presenza a Milano, con 1 giorno a settimana di smart working;
  • Pacchetto retributivo competitivo: Offriamo una retribuzione commisurata all'esperienza e al ruolo, con un range tra 30.000 e 40.000 € lordi annui.


Sede di lavoro

Milano (in presenza, 1 giorno alla settimana di flexible working).

Title: Data Analyst - Analytics Engineering
Description:
About Us

Satispay began by rethinking the simple act of a payment to remove the friction from our daily routines. But we didn’t stop there. Today, we are building a complete financial platform designed to empower people and concretely improve their lives. By giving our 6 million users a clear, open path to pay, save, and invest, we are evolving into the definitive destination for every financial need.

What You'll Be Doing

As our Data Analyst - Analytics Engineering, you’ll be the person who drives our data strategy and enhances decision-making by developing scalable data assets and AI-powered workflows. You will join the Growth & Marketing (G&M) B2C Analytics team, which sits at the heart of our department with the mission to put intelligence first in every decision. Here's what your day-to-day will look like:


Lead Design Data Architecture – Drive the development of the Data Mesh layer by designing robust data models and building pipelines that integrate into the company's federated data strategy, ensuring scalable and governed data ownership.
Define AI Agentic Workflows – Design and implement AI-powered agentic workflows for data transformation and exploration, accelerating analytical capabilities and enabling self-service for key stakeholders.
Build High-Impact Visualisation Tools – Define key metrics and develop dashboards and reports (using tools like Hex or Looker) that communicate analytical insights effectively.
Drive Decision-Making Through Data – Analyse complex datasets to identify patterns impacting the consumer funnel (Acquisition, Engagement, Retention, Monetisation) and partner with Marketing Managers to maximise ROI.
Partner with Key Stakeholders – Act as a strategic partner for Marketing, Finance, Operations, and Product, bridging the gap between technical data and business goals.
Drive Testing Initiatives – Own the end-to-end testing pipeline, from opportunity identification to experiment design and recommendation delivery.


Who We're Looking For

We need a problem-solver who loves teamwork and gets things done. If you're curious and ready for real ownership, you'll fit in! Does this sound like you?


Relevant Experience – 5+ years in data-related roles (Data Engineering, Analytics, BI) with at least 3 years of hands-on experience in high-volume or big data environments.
Technical Proficiency – Strong command of SQL, dbt, and Python. Experience with Git and notebook-based analytics (e.g., Jupyter) is a plus.
Data Modelling & Mesh Expertise – Hands-on experience in data modelling, ETL, data governance, and Data Mesh implementation at scale.
AI Fluency — Comfortable using AI tools day-to-day for analytics, automation, and generating ad-hoc analyses, C-level summaries, marketing campaign suggestions, and business cases efficiently using AI agents. Basic to mid-level proficiency with Claude is a strong plus. Experience interacting with agents programmatically via APIs is a plus.
Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills – Comfortable with ambiguity, able to break down complex problems into focused workstreams and deliver evidence-based answers.
Stakeholder Management & Communication – Able to independently lead initiatives across diverse business domains and translate technical findings into clear, actionable recommendations.
Digital Consumer Lifecycle Knowledge – Solid understanding of consumer lifecycle (Acquisition, Activation, Retention, Churn) and user economics (ARPU, CAC, LTV).


CareAbout: how we support your impact

About

We move fast, and evolution never stops. It’s a fun ride, but it can be challenging. To make sure our people truly thrive, we’re committed to making their lives easier, both in the office and out in the world. That’s why we created CareAbout:

❤️ Health (Private insurance for you and your family, psychological support with Serenis, mental health workshops)

💰 Financial resources (Stock Option Plan, Meal vouchers, Relocation support if you’re moving countries)

⚙️ Growth and development (Professional development programs, Internal mobility, Language courses with Preply)

🌱 Flexibility (Unlimited PTO, Hybrid working policy*, Flexible working hours)

👨‍👩‍👧 Family (Enhanced parental leave, Additional leave for child sickness)


We embrace three days per week in-office (Tuesday and Thursday + 1 of your choice), with the option to request extra remote time.


Salary: €40,000 - €54,000 gross per annum

This range is set using objective, gender-neutral criteria for the role's core requirements. However, we do not believe in putting a ceiling on talent. The final compensation package is tailored according to your unique experience and expertise. If your skills go beyond the standard profile, apply anyway so we can discuss a package that reflects your true value.

Equal opportunity employer

At Satispay, we're proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and inclusion, welcoming individuals of all backgrounds. This opportunity is open to everyone, regardless - for instance - of race, colour, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, and national origin. Join us in a workplace where everyone belongs!

Learn More About Us

Our values and pillars aren’t just fancy words on a page - they really shape everything we do. Explore them here.

Title: Business Intelligence Developer
HTML:
Aubay è una società leader in Europa nelle aree di consulenza direzionale e ICT, quotata al mercato NYSE Euronext di Parigi.



La nostra Proposta:

Siamo alla ricerca di un* Business Intelligence Developer.

Sarai responsabile della progettazione, sviluppo e manutenzione di soluzioni di Business Intelligence basate su Power BI, con l’obiettivo di trasformare dati complessi in informazioni chiare, affidabili e utili al processo decisionale aziendale.

Nello specifico, le attività riguarderanno:

  • progettazione e sviluppo di report e dashboard interattive in Power BI;
  • utilizzo di Power Query per la preparazione, pulizia e trasformazione dei dati;
  • sviluppo di query SQL per l’estrazione e la trasformazione dei dati da database relazionali e altre sorgenti;
  • creazione di misure e KPI complessi tramite DAX;
  • supporto all’evoluzione delle architetture BI.


Requisiti richiesti:

  • Esperienza di almeno 2 anni nel ruolo;
  • Ottima conoscenza di Power BI (Desktop e Service) per sviluppo report e dashboard;
  • Ottima conoscenza di SQL;
  • Buona conoscenza di DAX e Power Query;


Modalità Operativa:

Le attività verranno svolte da remoto.


Compensation & Benefit:

La proposta economica sarà valutata rispetto alla seniority e alle competenze del candidato.

RAL 33000 - 41000 + buoni pasto.


Iter di Selezione:

Il percorso di selezione prevede un primo approfondimento conoscitivo/motivazionale con il referente HR dedicato e una successiva fase di valutazione e presentazione delle tematiche tecnico/progettuali.

Gli incontri sono da intendersi prevalentemente gestibili online, a cui si può aggiungere o sostituire un incontro in presenza sulle nostre sedi.



Il presente annuncio è rivolto ad entrambi i sessi, ai sensi delle leggi 903/77 e 125/91 e a persone di tutte le età e tutte le nazionalità, ai sensi dei d.lvi 215 e 216/03.

Aubay – Ahead of innovation

Title: Data Analist Professional
Description:
Wat jij mag verwachten

Als Data Analyst Professional speel je een sleutelrol in het ontwerpen en uitbouwen van ons centrale datamodel en de semantische laag. Je werkt met moderne tools zoals Microsoft Fabric, DBT en Power BI en neemt ownership over modellering, standaarden en best practices. Daarnaast ben je een belangrijke sparringpartner voor collega’s en help je hen groeien in expertise.Je rapporteert aan de Teamlead Resource Pool Data en werkt voornamelijk op de gold layer, waar je businessnoden vertaalt naar consistente, schaalbare datamodellen die écht gebruikt worden.

Zo ziet jouw takenpakket eruit

Je ontwerpt en implementeert robuuste, businessgerichte datamodellen in DBT (dimensioneel, business-driven).
Je bouwt en onderhoudt het centrale datamodel (gold layer).
Je definieert en bewaakt standaarden rond modellering, naming conventions en versioning.
Je integreert data uit verschillende bronnen tot één coherent en herbruikbaar geheel.
Je waakt over data-consistentie, kwaliteit en herbruikbaarheid.
Je werkt nauw samen met data engineers (brondata → silver → gold).
Je vertaalt businessvragen naar KPI’s, measures en semantische definities.
Je maakt self-service analytics mogelijk via duidelijke datasets en governance.
Je fungeert als sparringpartner voor business stakeholders.
Je geeft gerichte opleidingen over het gebruik en de inhoud van semantische modellen.
Je stimuleert kennisdeling en draagt bij aan de verdere maturiteit van het team.




Wat wij verwachten

Must‑haves

Sterke ervaring (enkele jaren) in datamodellering en analytics
Aantoonbare ervaring met DBT (modelling, testing, documentation)
Zeer goede kennis van SQL
Ervaring met Power BI (focus op datasets en semantische modellen)
Sterk inzicht in dimensionele modellering (facts & dimensions)
Ervaring in samenwerking met data engineers en stakeholders
Sterke analytische en communicatieve vaardigheden




Nice‑to‑haves

Ervaring met Microsoft Fabric of gelijkaardige platforms
Ervaring met data governance tools (bv. Purview)
Kennis van Git, data contracten en CI/CD
Ervaring in Agile/Scrum omgevingen

Title: Data Analyst/Engineer
Description:
We are wizards who turn data into knowledge. We execute E2E projects in team and work as consultants for various clients (and sectors) – partly on-site/partly from home – to assist them with Microsoft data solutions. Our credo is to empower every professional to make the best data-driven decision. Transforming data into usable knowledge is something you have right at your fingertips.




Your role as a Data Analyt/Engineer

Within this role, you will also contribute to data modelling activities in Power BI environments or data warehouses, translating business requirements into structured data models and validating them with stakeholders.




Managing and customising the ETL or ELT process (Extract, transform, load)

Setting up and customising data integrations and data modelling (SSIS , SSAS, SSRS)

You will be using Microsoft data services on-premise or in Azure, or a combination of both.




Project-based or long-term assignments, all options are on the table. Depending on the assignment, you may be working on your own or in a team, taking care of the project management yourself or not. Participating in pre-sales is also a possibility. The trump cards of this job are variety and continuous learning through experience.




But don’t worry.




The roles within assignments and their complexity will be tailored to you: sufficiently challenging for learning and not over your head. If you demonstrate a keenness to learn, independence and initiative, you will be absolutely fine. Don’t forget that you have a team of helpful Koherians standing behind you who will be happy to help you and facilitate your development.




Experience and Technical skills

3 to 6 years of experience in a Data Analyst, Data Engineer or similar data role
Hands-on experience with Power BI
Experience with Azure Data Lake services
Strong knowledge of T-SQL and ETL development using Azure components or on-premise tools such as Azure Data Factory or SSIS
Experience with Azure Data Factory, Microsoft Fabric or Azure Synapse Analytics is an asset
Knowledge of Python or Databricks is a plus




Languages

Fluency in Dutch and English is a must, and fluency in French would be a bonus.




Are you our next Data Wizard? Don't hesitate and apply!

Title: Data-analist
Description:
Functieomschrijving




Streef jij naar optimalisatie, werk je graag zaken grondig uit en wil je ook je communicatieve vaardigheden kwijt? Dan is dit jouw job!




Als Data analist met focus op datamodelling werk je samen met je collega's aan het creëren, onderhouden en beheren van centrale datastores die als inputbron dienen voor andere applicaties binnen onze organisatie.




Wat doe je concreet?

Je werkt mee aan integratie- en dataprojecten waarbij je in kaart brengt welke data centraal moet worden bijgehouden en beheerd. Je verzamelt de functionele requirements voor de betrokken datastore en vertaalt deze naar een helder datamodel, dat vervolgens verder wordt uitgewerkt door technische designers en developers.




Je neemt actief deel aan workshops om de mappings tussen applicaties en de centrale datastore te bespreken en te aligneren. In samenspraak met technische collega's maak je weloverwogen keuzes over het type database en de ontsluiting ervan — voornamelijk via webservices in een AWS-omgeving.




Daarnaast neem je deel aan integratietesten en ondersteun je de gebruikerstesten. Na livegang draag je bij aan de ondersteuning en het beheer van de systemen.

Je combineert proceskennis met analytisch vermogen: je begrijpt de databehoefte vanuit functioneel perspectief, schrijft heldere specificaties én werkt het datamodel uit dat als basis dient voor de databaseopbouw.




Jouw expertisedomein omvat onder meer:

MDM — kennis van Master Data Management is een pluspunt; sommige databases worden volgens dit concept opgezet, andere eerder operationeel.
SQL — een must om de nodige technische ondersteuning te kunnen bieden.
AI — bij voorkeur heb je ervaring met het inzetten van AI ter ondersteuning van analyse en testing.
GDPR & security — aangezien we werken met gevoelige persoonsdata, zijn audit, privacy en beveiliging geen bijzaak. Als analist ben jij verantwoordelijk voor het bewaken en verankeren van deze topics in elk design.




Profiel

Je blikt terug op verschillende jaren ervaring binnen het domein rond datamodellering.
Je hebt ervaring in het gebruik van AI tools voor de ondersteuning van analyses & testen.
Dankzij jouw vlotte communicatieskills bouw je gemakkelijk professionele en constructieve relaties uit, zowel met de interne klant als met leveranciers.
Als teamplayer hou je ervan om samen met je collega’s resultaten en successen te behalen, maar je haalt evenzeer voldoening uit autonoom werken.
De volgende technische skills zijn een pluspunt:
Tools: Postman, Bruno, Jira, confluence
Databases: Oracle DB, MS SQL, PostGress, Aurora DB, Document DB
Begrippen: ISO27001, GDPR, MDM, ETL, UML
AI: Claude







Aanbod

Werken bij RGF Staffing, dat is werken in een dynamische en flexibele omgeving. Je komt terecht in een team van enthousiaste collega’s, waar je kan rekenen op een goede begeleiding on the job en sterke ontplooiings- en opleidingskansen die jou een mooi perspectief bieden.




RGF Staffing is een innovatief bedrijf waar altijd wat beweegt, een saaie boel wordt het dus nooit.

In ruil voor jouw inzet, bieden we jou een competitief salarispakket, met tal van extralegale voordelen zoals maaltijdcheques, een nettovergoeding, een aantrekkelijk bonussysteem, een eindejaarspremie, groeps- en hospitalisatieverzekering, 32 welverdiende vakantie- en ADV-dagen (afhankelijk van je arbeidsduur) en een bedrijfswagen of mobiliteitsbudget. ‘Work’ en ‘life’ blijven steeds in balans dankzij de uitgebreide thuiswerkmogelijkheden (50%) en flexibele werktijden. Leuke extra’s centrale ligging in Antwerpen en de vele funmomenten met de collega’s. Want de boog kan natuurlijk niet altijd gespannen staan.







Bedrijfsinfo

RGF Staffing Belgium maakt deel uit van de internationale human resources groep RGF Staffing. Met ruim 2400 werknemers bekleden we in België de tweede positie. Als HR dienstverlener biedt RGF Staffing alle vormen van flexibele arbeid en uiteenlopende diensten aan op het gebied van HR en customer-care services. De Belgische bedrijven van RGF Staffing zijn: Start People, Solvus, USG Professionals, Bright Plus & Unique.




Vanuit het hoofdkantoor in Antwerpen bieden onze gedreven collega’s, elk binnen hun eigen expertise, deze bedrijven de nodige support op vlak van o.a. IT, legal, finance, payroll, … zodat zij zich op hun beurt kunnen focussen op hun core-business: het matchen van kandidaten en klanten.

Onze manier van werken? Digitaal waar het kan, zonder het mensgerichte uit het oog te verliezen. De mens, die staat centraal in onze organisatie.




Voor onze betrokken collega’s bieden we een dynamische werkomgeving waarin ieder zichzelf kan zijn en gelijke kansen krijgt om te groeien en het beste van zichzelf te geven.

Jouw talent is belangrijker dan je geslacht, gender, afkomst, leeftijd, geaardheid, handicap of chronische ziekte. Niemand is zoals jij, en dat maakt jou 100 % uniek. Wij staan voor diversiteit en inclusie, en zetten maximaal in op jouw sterke skills.




Wil jij mee het verschil maken? Wij kijken er alvast naar uit meer over jou te weten te komen!

Title: Data Analist / Data Quality Analist
Description:
Binnen BESIX Infra Support bouwen we aan een moderne, data-gedreven organisatie. Onze ploegen, projectleiders, planners, finance en aankoopteams vertrouwen dagelijks op correcte data om operationele processen efficiënt te ondersteunen. Met de migratie van Navision naar Business Central investeren we in de toekomst, en zoeken we versterking om kwaliteit, structuur en stabiliteit van onze data te waarborgen.

Daarom versterken we ons team met een Data Analist / Data Quality Analist die wil meehelpen aan een strategische transformatie.




Vacatureomschrijving

Als Data Analist / Data Quality Analist speel je een sleutelrol in het begrijpen, verbeteren en bewaken van onze data. Je werkt nauw samen met Business Analysts, Data Stewards, IT en verschillende afdelingen (Finance, Planning, HR, Fleet, Projectleiding). Je helpt de organisatie om data correct te interpreteren, te structureren en te benutten in het kader van:

ERP-migratie (NAV → Business Central)
Masterdata-opbouw
Rapportering en operationele processen
Datakwaliteit en governance

Je bent zowel analytisch als communicatief sterk. Je kan diep in data duiken, maar ook helder en pragmatisch uitleggen wat de impact is voor de business.

1. Data Analyse & Profiling

Analyseren van brondata uit NAV/4PS en andere systemen.
Uitvoeren van dataprofiling om kwaliteit, structuur en inconsistenties te begrijpen.
Detecteren van fouten, duplicaten, ontbrekende waarden en afwijkingen.
Opstellen van aanbevelingen voor datacontroles, remediation en kwaliteitsverbetering.
Gebruik van Power BI om datakwaliteit te visualiseren (completeness %, duplicate rates, invalid values).
Ondersteunen van migratieactiviteiten zoals mapping, validatiereeksen en cleaning scripts.

2. Data Governance & Kwaliteitsprocessen

Meewerken aan datadefinities, naming conventions en datastandaarden.
Uitbouwen en onderhouden van een datacatalogus en data lineage documentatie.
Opstellen van datakwaliteitsregels en controles (accuracy, completeness, consistency, timeliness).
Bewaken van datastromen en ondersteunen van data stewards bij hun verantwoordelijkheden.
Uitwerken van praktische documentatie die door niet-technische afdelingen kan worden gebruikt.

3. Business- & Stakeholdercommunicatie

Complexe data-oplossingen vertalen naar heldere, bruikbare informatie.
Nauwe samenwerking met Business Analysts voor functionele en technische alignering.
Duidelijk communiceren met business stakeholders zoals werfleiding, HR, aankoop, planning en finance.
Actief bijdragen aan een constructieve, oplossingsgerichte cultuur.

Functie-eisen

Technische kennis

Sterke ervaring met SQL is vereist.
Ervaring met Python is een pluspunt.
Vaardig met Power BI en BI-rapportering.
Begrip van ERP-datamodellen en migratieprocessen (NAV/4PS, Business Central).
Ervaring met data quality rules, profiling en cleansing.
Inzicht in metadata, governance en datacatalogi.

Analytische vaardigheden

Sterk analytisch en probleemoplossend denkvermogen.
Kunnen werken met grote en complexe datasets.
Systematisch en gestructureerd te werk gaan.
End-to-end impactanalyses kunnen uitvoeren.

Soft skills

Communicatief sterk en helder in uitleg.
Proactief en oplossingsgericht.
Ownership nemen, verantwoordelijkheid dragen en zelfstandig vooruitgang boeken.
Samenwerken in multidisciplinaire teams.
Flexibel omgaan met verandering en onvolledige informatie.

Wat verwachten we qua achtergrond?

Bachelor of Master in data-analyse, statistiek, informatica, economie of gelijkwaardig door ervaring.
Ervaring in organisaties met veel operationele flows (bouw, logistiek, industrie) is een plus.
Relevante ervaring als data-analist of data-kwaliteitsspecialist is een troef.
Ervaring in ERP-trajecten of digitale transformaties is een voordeel.

Wat bieden we?

Een strategische rol in een cruciaal transformatietraject.
Nauwe samenwerking met Business Analysts, Data Stewards en ERP-projectteams.
Werken in een omgeving waar pragmatiek, ownership en teamwork centraal staan.
De mogelijkheid om datakwaliteit, governance en procesoptimalisaties mee uit te bouwen.
Een sterke impact op de toekomst van data binnen BESIX in Schelle.

Aanvullende informatie

Je komt terecht in een groeiend bedrijf waar de grootste succesfactor het enthousiasme en de creativiteit van de eigen medewerkers is. Wij bieden jou:

Een voltijdse vaste functie met afwisseling en verantwoordelijkheid.
Een competitief loon aangevuld met extralegale voordelen zoals onder andere maaltijdcheques, ecocheques, verzekeringen,…
Een job in een bedrijf met de ambitie om te groeien.

Title: Decision Intelligence Developer
Description:
Can’t wait to make an impact on the world? You’re not alone. Join us in driving progress in the working world and beyond.

Your journey with us

We’re seeking a talented Data Skill Builder to join our Supply Chain Data Team. In this role, you’ll be the bridge between complex data systems and actionable insights—extracting, transforming, and visualizing data from diverse sources to fuel intelligent decision-making. You’ll work closely with architects and business stakeholders to build robust data pipelines and compelling analytics that drive supply chain optimization. If you’re passionate about turning raw data into business value and thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced environment, this is your opportunity to make a tangible impact.

What You’ll Do


Data Extraction & Integration: Extract data from multiple enterprise systems (ERP, WMS, TMS, planning tools) and third-party sources; design and build reliable data pipelines that consolidate information into unified datasets
Data Analysis & Transformation: Perform exploratory data analysis, identify data quality issues, and transform raw data into clean, structured formats ready for analytics and modeling
Analytics Development: Develop analytical queries, dashboards, and reports that surface key insights; translate business questions into data-driven answers
Data Visualization: Create compelling visualizations and interactive dashboards (Tableau, Power BI) that communicate complex data stories to business stakeholders in clear, actionable ways
Collaboration with Architects: Work closely with Solution Architects to understand technical requirements; implement data solutions according to architectural specifications and best practices
Data Quality & Governance: Implement data validation checks, monitor data quality, and maintain documentation; ensure data consistency and reliability across systems
Continuous Learning: Stay current with data engineering tools, analytics techniques, and emerging technologies; contribute ideas for improving data processes and methodologies


Let's Talk About You


Data Engineering Fundamentals: 3+ years of hands-on experience building data pipelines, ETL processes, and working with SQL and relational/non-relational databases
Programming Proficiency: Strong experience with Python, SQL, or similar languages; ability to write clean, maintainable code and debug technical issues independently
Analytics & Visualization: Demonstrated expertise with analytics tools (Tableau, Power BI, Looker) and statistical analysis; ability to translate data into compelling visual narratives
Cloud & Data Platforms: Familiarity with cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) and experience working with data warehouses, data lakes, or big data platforms (Spark, Hadoop)
Problem-Solving Mindset: Strong analytical thinking; ability to break down complex data challenges and find practical solutions with minimal guidance
Communication Skills: Ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders; comfortable presenting findings and collaborating across teams
Passion for Data: Genuine curiosity about data; track record of delivering data projects that drove measurable business insights or operational improvements


Primary Focus: Data Excellence Over Platform Specificity

While Familiarity With Aera Technology Is a Nice-to-have, Data Engineering And Analytics Expertise Is What Matters Most. We Value Professionals Who


Prioritize data quality, pipeline reliability, and analytical rigor above platform-specific knowledge
Can quickly learn new tools and platforms as business needs evolve
Understand when to build custom solutions vs. leverage existing platforms
Bring deep experience with core data technologies: Python, SQL, cloud data warehouses, BI tools, and ML frameworks


Supporting Technologies

Data & Analytics : Python, SQL, Spark, Kafka, TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, XGBoost

Cloud Platforms: AWS, Azure, GCP

Data Warehousing: Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Delta Lake

Visualization & BI: Tableau, Power BI, Looker

DevOps & Deployment: Git, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines

Our story

Deloitte is a globally recognized professional services firm committed to making an impact that matters. Our Supply Chain & Network Operations practice supports clients in addressing their most critical supply chain challenges through strategic, analytical, and technology-enabled projects. We deliver end-to-end, data-driven redesign and digitization to transform key areas such as planning, sourcing & procurement, manufacturing, and logistics & distribution. Join our team in Belgium and work with clients across diverse industries as we advise, implement, and operate solutions that drive sustainable growth and operational excellence.

Who is Deloitte?

We provide industry-leading audit and assurance, tax and legal, consulting and related services. We are committed to driving innovation across offerings to help our clients address their challenges, while giving our professionals opportunities to learn and grow in this era of transformation.

In Belgium, +5000 dedicated professionals active in +10 offices, take great pride in bringing multidisciplinary expertise to a wide variety of clients, from national and international companies, small, fast-growing and large organizations to public institutions and governmental authorities.

Why Deloitte?

Be the true you! We foster diversity and inclusion and encourage you to bring your authentic self to work. Explore, question and collaborate while building a career that inspires and energises you.

Never stop growing! Diversity of thought makes us stronger. At Deloitte, we tailor a personalized learning experience, offering you the opportunity to grow at your own pace and achieve maximum impact.

We practice what we preach! As a Purpose-led organisation, at the heart of everything we do is a set of timeless principles and unifying values .

My Benefits My Choice, a flexible rewards plan tailored to your lifestyle and priorities

Join us to make an impact together! Apply now!

HTML:
Can’t wait to make an impact on the world? You’re not alone. Join us in driving progress in the working world and beyond.

Your journey with us

We’re seeking a talented Data Skill Builder to join our Supply Chain Data Team. In this role, you’ll be the bridge between complex data systems and actionable insights—extracting, transforming, and visualizing data from diverse sources to fuel intelligent decision-making. You’ll work closely with architects and business stakeholders to build robust data pipelines and compelling analytics that drive supply chain optimization. If you’re passionate about turning raw data into business value and thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced environment, this is your opportunity to make a tangible impact.

What You’ll Do

  • Data Extraction & Integration: Extract data from multiple enterprise systems (ERP, WMS, TMS, planning tools) and third-party sources; design and build reliable data pipelines that consolidate information into unified datasets
  • Data Analysis & Transformation: Perform exploratory data analysis, identify data quality issues, and transform raw data into clean, structured formats ready for analytics and modeling
  • Analytics Development: Develop analytical queries, dashboards, and reports that surface key insights; translate business questions into data-driven answers
  • Data Visualization: Create compelling visualizations and interactive dashboards (Tableau, Power BI) that communicate complex data stories to business stakeholders in clear, actionable ways
  • Collaboration with Architects: Work closely with Solution Architects to understand technical requirements; implement data solutions according to architectural specifications and best practices
  • Data Quality & Governance: Implement data validation checks, monitor data quality, and maintain documentation; ensure data consistency and reliability across systems
  • Continuous Learning: Stay current with data engineering tools, analytics techniques, and emerging technologies; contribute ideas for improving data processes and methodologies

Let's Talk About You

  • Data Engineering Fundamentals: 3+ years of hands-on experience building data pipelines, ETL processes, and working with SQL and relational/non-relational databases
  • Programming Proficiency: Strong experience with Python, SQL, or similar languages; ability to write clean, maintainable code and debug technical issues independently
  • Analytics & Visualization: Demonstrated expertise with analytics tools (Tableau, Power BI, Looker) and statistical analysis; ability to translate data into compelling visual narratives
  • Cloud & Data Platforms: Familiarity with cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) and experience working with data warehouses, data lakes, or big data platforms (Spark, Hadoop)
  • Problem-Solving Mindset: Strong analytical thinking; ability to break down complex data challenges and find practical solutions with minimal guidance
  • Communication Skills: Ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders; comfortable presenting findings and collaborating across teams
  • Passion for Data: Genuine curiosity about data; track record of delivering data projects that drove measurable business insights or operational improvements

Primary Focus: Data Excellence Over Platform Specificity

While Familiarity With Aera Technology Is a Nice-to-have, Data Engineering And Analytics Expertise Is What Matters Most. We Value Professionals Who

  • Prioritize data quality, pipeline reliability, and analytical rigor above platform-specific knowledge
  • Can quickly learn new tools and platforms as business needs evolve
  • Understand when to build custom solutions vs. leverage existing platforms
  • Bring deep experience with core data technologies: Python, SQL, cloud data warehouses, BI tools, and ML frameworks

Supporting Technologies

Data & Analytics : Python, SQL, Spark, Kafka, TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, XGBoost

Cloud Platforms: AWS, Azure, GCP

Data Warehousing: Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Delta Lake

Visualization & BI: Tableau, Power BI, Looker

DevOps & Deployment: Git, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines

Collaboration: Jira, Confluence, design tools

Title: AI Data Analyst
Description:
Over Vandelanotte

Vandelanotte is een geïntegreerd advieskantoor dat ondernemingen ondersteunt op vlak van accountancy, audit, fiscaliteit, legal en bredere bedrijfsvoering. Wat ons onderscheidt, is de manier waarop we technologie en expertise combineren om klanten proactief te begeleiden in hun groei.

Vandaag bouwen we doelgericht aan een geïntegreerd data- en AI-platform als motor van onze Embedded Advisor-strategie, waarbij data en AI onze dienstverlening slimmer, sneller en meer voorspellend maken.

Binnen het Innovation Lab ontwikkelen en versnellen we AI-toepassingen die die ambitie concreet maken. Jij zorgt ervoor dat data daarbij niet alleen beschikbaar is, maar ook effectief leidt tot inzichten en gerichte acties met impact.

Jouw rol en verantwoordelijkheden

Als AI Data Analyst zet je data om in inzichten en voorspellende modellen die directe commerciële en operationele waarde creëren. Je werkt op het snijvlak van data, business en AI, en vertaalt analyses naar concrete acties voor adviseurs en klanten.

Je analyseert data uit verschillende domeinen zoals accountancy, fiscaliteit, HR, audit en externe bronnen, en detecteert opportuniteiten, risico’s en trends die relevant zijn voor onze dienstverlening. Vanuit die inzichten formuleer je gerichte aanbevelingen en “next best actions” die onze adviseurs ondersteunen in hun dagelijkse praktijk. Daarnaast ontwikkel je voorspellende modellen die bijdragen aan datagedreven besluitvorming. Je vertaalt complexe analyses naar heldere inzichten en maakt ze bruikbaar voor niet-technische stakeholders.

Je werkt nauw samen met AI engineers, developers en business stakeholders, en draagt actief bij aan het verbeteren van datakwaliteit en datastructuren. Tegelijk verken je continu nieuwe mogelijkheden van AI-tools en analytische technieken, en zet je die pragmatisch in waar ze effectief waarde toevoegen.

Wie ben je?


Master of bachelor met sterke academische basis
3–7 jaar ervaring in data-analyse, BI of data consulting
Sterk in SQL en BI-tools
Ervaring met datamodellering en analyse in een AI-context
Kennis van voorspellende analyse en statistische technieken
Ervaring met TypeScript / JavaScript is een plus
Affiniteit met financiële data is een plus
Sterk analytisch en conceptueel denkvermogen
Businessgericht en gericht op impact
In staat om inzichten helder te communiceren naar niet-technische stakeholders


Wat mag je verwachten?

Een rol waarin je niet louter rapporteert, maar écht impact maakt. Je draagt rechtstreeks bij aan commerciële groei, klantwaarde en slimmere besluitvorming binnen Vandelanotte. Je werkt in een klein, gespecialiseerd AI- en datateam met een sterke link naar de business en strategie. Je krijgt de ruimte om initiatief te nemen, ownership op te nemen en nieuwe toepassingen mee vorm te geven.

Daarnaast krijg je bij Vandelanotte niet alleen een mooi, uitgebreid loonpakket, maar ook de mogelijkheid om jouw werksituatie optimaal af te stemmen op jouw privésituatie. Je kan kiezen voor thuiswerk, flexibele werkuren, bedrijfswagen en nog zoveel meer. Dankzij onze 40-urenweek geniet je van 12 ADV-dagen, wat op 32 verlofdagen komt. En heb je hiermee niet genoeg? Dan kan je nog extra vakantiedagen kopen (via ons cafetariaplan). Ons loonpakket bestaat standaard uit een bruto maandwedde, onkostenvergoeding, gsm-abonnement, hospitalisatie-, groeps- en invaliditeitsverzekering, bedrijfswagen (elektrisch) en tankkaart.

Tot slot kom je terecht in een organisatie waar professionaliteit en menselijkheid hand in hand gaan. Als familiale onderneming hechten we veel belang aan een toegankelijke en open manier van samenwerken, waar beslissingen snel genomen worden en betrokkenheid geen loze belofte is. Je werkt in een omgeving waar collega’s elkaar kennen, ondersteunen en samen bouwen aan een toekomstgerichte organisatie.

Title: Data-analist
Description:
Data Analyst




#DataAnalyst #PowerBI #MSFabric #DataDriven #Bouwsector #Analytics #RenotecJobs #WeAreRenotec




Jouw impact als Data Analyst

Bij Renotec maken we elke dag keuzes die impact hebben op onze organisatie. Als Data Analyst zorg jij dat die beslissingen niet op buikgevoel gebeuren, maar op basis van heldere inzichten.

Jij brengt structuur in data over de hele business: van werven en projecten tot ondersteunende diensten. Je maakt verbanden zichtbaar en geeft teams houvast om betere beslissingen te nemen.

Je bouwt geen rapporten om het rapporteren. Je zorgt ervoor dat cijfers richting geven: van budgetopvolging en rendementen tot strategische keuzes.




Wat deze rol bijzonder maakt?

Je komt terecht in een omgeving waar data nog volop in ontwikkeling is. Geen vastgeroeste structuren maar ruimte om zelf te bepalen wat relevant is, hoe je het aanpakt en waar je écht het verschil maakt.




Wie zijn wij?

“Bij Renotec combineren we vakmanschap met innovatie om historisch waardevolle gebouwen, kunstwerken, ondergrondse leidingen en monumenten te restaureren en een nieuwe bestemming te geven. We zijn een groeiend en innovatief bedrijf met een duidelijke missie: medewerkers laten groeien en een duurzame toekomst opbouwen. De werksfeer? Energiek, ondersteunend en collegiaal. Je krijgt de vrijheid om je eigen stempel te drukken en echt impact te maken.”




Wat ga je doen?

Je bouwt en beheert een sterk datafundament: van databronnen tot semantische modellen
Je vertaalt businessvragen naar heldere dashboards en bruikbare inzichten (Power BI)
Je modelleert en optimaliseert data met DAX, T-SQL op een MS Fabric platform
Je bewaakt kwaliteit en governance: toegangen, validatie en correct gebruik van rapporten
Je begeleidt gebruikers en zorgt dat data écht wordt ingezet in de praktijk
Je spot verbeterkansen in processen en vertaalt data naar concrete acties




Wie ben jij?

Je hebt ervaring als Data Analyst / BI Analyst
Je werkt vlot met:
Power BI (visualisaties & datamodellen)
DAX & T-SQL
MS Fabric (of sterke interesse om hierin te groeien)
Je begrijpt hoe data omgezet wordt naar bruikbare inzichten voor business teams
Je denkt kritisch: je ziet niet alleen cijfers, maar ook verbeterkansen
Je communiceert helder en kan complexe analyses simpel uitleggen




Wat bieden we jou?

Bij ons krijg je niet alleen een boeiende job, maar ook een aantrekkelijk en compleet verloningspakket:




Competitief bruto loon – omdat jouw expertise waardevol is.
Netto onkostenvergoeding & dagvergoeding – extra voordelen voor jouw dagelijkse inzet.
Bedrijfswagen + tankkaart – zodat je vlot en zonder zorgen de baan op kan.
Laptop, iPhone, + abonnementen – alles wat je nodig hebt om efficiënt te werken.
Hospitalisatie- en groepsverzekering – zekerheid voor jou en je toekomst.
Deelname in de winst (na 1 jaar) – want succes vieren we samen.
13e maand / flexplan – kies zelf hoe je jouw extra voordelen inzet.
Uitgebreide opleidings- en ontwikkelingsmogelijkheden – blijf groeien met interne en externe trainingen. Groei en ontwikkel je carrière met ons toekomstgericht team
Gezonde werkcultuur – elke middag verse soep, brood en fruit, plus een fitnessruimte.
Toffe collega’s en een hecht team – waar samenwerking en een goede sfeer centraal staan.




Wil jij je carrière naar een hoger niveau tillen en bijdragen aan unieke restauratieprojecten? Solliciteer nu en word deel van ons team!

Tot slot kom je terecht in een organisatie waar professionaliteit en menselijkheid hand in hand gaan. Als familiale onderneming hechten we veel belang aan een toegankelijke en open manier van samenwerken, waar beslissingen snel genomen worden en betrokkenheid geen loze belofte is. Je werkt in een omgeving waar collega’s elkaar kennen, ondersteunen en samen bouwen aan een toekomstgerichte organisatie.
Show more
HTML:
Over Vandelanotte

Vandelanotte is een geïntegreerd advieskantoor dat ondernemingen ondersteunt op vlak van accountancy, audit, fiscaliteit, legal en bredere bedrijfsvoering. Wat ons onderscheidt, is de manier waarop we technologie en expertise combineren om klanten proactief te begeleiden in hun groei.

Vandaag bouwen we doelgericht aan een geïntegreerd data- en AI-platform als motor van onze Embedded Advisor-strategie, waarbij data en AI onze dienstverlening slimmer, sneller en meer voorspellend maken.

Binnen het Innovation Lab ontwikkelen en versnellen we AI-toepassingen die die ambitie concreet maken. Jij zorgt ervoor dat data daarbij niet alleen beschikbaar is, maar ook effectief leidt tot inzichten en gerichte acties met impact.

Jouw rol en verantwoordelijkheden

Als AI Data Analyst zet je data om in inzichten en voorspellende modellen die directe commerciële en operationele waarde creëren. Je werkt op het snijvlak van data, business en AI, en vertaalt analyses naar concrete acties voor adviseurs en klanten.

Je analyseert data uit verschillende domeinen zoals accountancy, fiscaliteit, HR, audit en externe bronnen, en detecteert opportuniteiten, risico’s en trends die relevant zijn voor onze dienstverlening. Vanuit die inzichten formuleer je gerichte aanbevelingen en “next best actions” die onze adviseurs ondersteunen in hun dagelijkse praktijk. Daarnaast ontwikkel je voorspellende modellen die bijdragen aan datagedreven besluitvorming. Je vertaalt complexe analyses naar heldere inzichten en maakt ze bruikbaar voor niet-technische stakeholders.

Je werkt nauw samen met AI engineers, developers en business stakeholders, en draagt actief bij aan het verbeteren van datakwaliteit en datastructuren. Tegelijk verken je continu nieuwe mogelijkheden van AI-tools en analytische technieken, en zet je die pragmatisch in waar ze effectief waarde toevoegen.

Wie ben je?

  • Master of bachelor met sterke academische basis
  • 3–7 jaar ervaring in data-analyse, BI of data consulting
  • Sterk in SQL en BI-tools
  • Ervaring met datamodellering en analyse in een AI-context
  • Kennis van voorspellende analyse en statistische technieken
  • Ervaring met TypeScript / JavaScript is een plus
  • Affiniteit met financiële data is een plus
  • Sterk analytisch en conceptueel denkvermogen
  • Businessgericht en gericht op impact
  • In staat om inzichten helder te communiceren naar niet-technische stakeholders

Wat mag je verwachten?

Een rol waarin je niet louter rapporteert, maar écht impact maakt. Je draagt rechtstreeks bij aan commerciële groei, klantwaarde en slimmere besluitvorming binnen Vandelanotte. Je werkt in een klein, gespecialiseerd AI- en datateam met een sterke link naar de business en strategie. Je krijgt de ruimte om initiatief te nemen, ownership op te nemen en nieuwe toepassingen mee vorm te geven.

Daarnaast krijg je bij Vandelanotte niet alleen een mooi, uitgebreid loonpakket, maar ook de mogelijkheid om jouw werksituatie optimaal af te stemmen op jouw privésituatie. Je kan kiezen voor thuiswerk, flexibele werkuren, bedrijfswagen en nog zoveel meer. Dankzij onze 40-urenweek geniet je van 12 ADV-dagen, wat op 32 verlofdagen komt. En heb je hiermee niet genoeg? Dan kan je nog extra vakantiedagen kopen (via ons cafetariaplan). Ons loonpakket bestaat standaard uit een bruto maandwedde, onkostenvergoeding, gsm-abonnement, hospitalisatie-, groeps- en invaliditeitsverzekering, bedrijfswagen (elektrisch) en tankkaart.

Tot slot kom je terecht in een organisatie waar professionaliteit en menselijkheid hand in hand gaan. Als familiale onderneming hechten we veel belang aan een toegankelijke en open manier van samenwerken, waar beslissingen snel genomen worden en betrokkenheid geen loze belofte is. Je werkt in een omgeving waar collega’s elkaar kennen, ondersteunen en samen bouwen aan een toekomstgerichte organisatie.

Title: Data Management Analyst
Description:
We are currently looking for a Data Management Analyst who will support the IKO companies' master data accuracy, setup, and maintenance. Ensure data integrity across the business applications, including the ERP system. In this role, the individual is required to possess analytical skills to handle and execute business data requirements.




The Data Management Analyst must understand the value of data integrity to the whole organization, including information data lifecycle management, information modeling, master data management, and data requirements gathering. Work with our various ERP systems like JDE, Mapics, Navision, Handsoft, and Business Central. Knowledge of workflow and invoice automation tools like Bottomline, Datahaven, and Inspyrus is a plus. The individual should interact with the various business and information technology functions.




The Data Management Analyst will join the Global Master Data Management department of IKO Europe NV, based in Antwerp, and will report to the Global Master Data Manager.




WHEN YOU JOIN US YOU WILL;

Analysis

Execute master data setup and configuration in the various ERP systems and any other applications.
Coordinate own master data requests using workflow tools /central mailbox to ensure that data quality meets established standards and service level expectations.
Partner with internal and external customers to ensure data processes and procedures are followed and completed.
Analyze business requests for compliance and accuracy prior to data entry and completion.
Identify, analyze, and resolve Master data discrepancies.
Review and improve Master Data request guidelines to aid current processes to become more effective.
Provide master data support to all IKO business departments as needed.
Collaborate with business teams to understand their needs and provide data-driven recommendations.
Manage and govern master data across ERP systems (Customer, Vendor, Material/Product)
Define and enforce data standards, naming conventions, and validation rules
Ability to work independently and deliver in a fast-paced environment
Escalate to the Global Master Data Manager when required.




Data continuity and process improvement

Monitor the overall health of the data and execute cleansing efforts for all master data. Improved data quality, including duplicate resolution and hierarchy management.
Identify data and process opportunities through audits, metrics, and trends to evaluate, re-design, and implement continuous improvements.
Work under general supervision and independently solve moderately complex issues with minimal supervision, while escalating more complex issues to management.
Understanding of the end-to-end business processes to provide data management and integrity expertise.
Meet current service level agreements agreed upon with the business.
Complete daily/ weekly data integrity tasks.
Document data processes, workflows, and governance policies
Act as a subject matter expert for ERP master data




Collaboration and cross-functional support

Apply data audit and validation methods and procedures to ensure data quality.
Participate and support internal projects requiring data analysis.
Apply Business analysis while gathering data requirements to help with the various in-house projects related to workflow process improvements, plus other projects that may impact the master data side.
Collaborate with Finance, Supply Chain, Sales, and IT teams to understand requirements and provide analytical inputs; aid in resolving data issues.
Ability to work collaboratively in a team-oriented environment.
Support data conversion, integration, and ERP initiatives




OUR IDEAL CANDIDATE;

Minimum of 3 years of experience in master data management
Business degree in Information Systems/ Computer Science/ Supply Chain
Computer proficiency with Excel, Visio, Microsoft Word, PowerPoint, and Outlook.
Fluency in French and Dutch is required for effective communication with stakeholders
Utilization of advanced Excel features, such as VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, pivot tables, and data cleanup, to analyze and interpret business data
Proven experience as an MDM Analyst/ ERP Data Analyst
Previous work experience in data governance or a similar role; experience with data governance tools
Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills
Strong communication skills to communicate complex findings
Ability to jump in quickly with minimal training
Ability to document processes and procedures
Ability to troubleshoot data issues
Previous experience with data migration/conversion, data lifecycle, and data quality
Previous experience creating and changing data for vendors, customers, and products




Understanding of ERP master data concepts:

Customer
Vendor
Material/Product
Comfort working with structured data and following processes
Good written communication (tickets, documentation)
Familiarity with data quality checks and validation rules




Nice to have:

BI/reporting tool knowledge/ experience (Power BI, Tableau/ Reports Now)
Experience supporting ERP implementations or data conversions
Knowledge of SQL




WORK AUTHORIZATIONS AND TRAVEL;

Minimal travel (5 days or less annually and no business travel outside the local area)
